name_cn:
【Apricot】
LE 5A7 Series New Member_Phone Bag👓
Highly recommended this mini phone bag. For fashionistas who have seen it all, this exquisitely designed and compact bag is perfect for effortless styling✌🏻️ Minimalist design + metal logo clasp closure!
Practical and stylish, a high-frequency daily wear item~
Size: 18×13.5×3.5cm
Model: 735214
